_doctrine: Hardness is DECLARED data, never inferred at render time. hook = a mechanism fires without consent (PreToolUse deny, blocking exit). prose = the gate exists but invocation is voluntary or warn-first. unknown → renders HOLLOW (fail-honest). OSTROM-owned; editing this file is a gate-design decision — cite the rendered beat in decisions.md. Every mechanism claim below was grounded in the named file before declaration (2026-06-12).

handoff-validate.mechanism: 3-tier fail-closed validator — fires when wrapped via compose-handoff-wrap.sh; skipping the wrap skips it
handoff-validate.teaches: no room finishes silently — typed handoff, 5 required fields

compose-verify-run.mechanism: warn-first exit code — verdict-bearing when invoked, nothing forces invocation
compose-verify-run.teaches: a result without a valid_run verdict is role-play, not a run

adversarial-review-gate.mechanism: PreToolUse:Write blocks */COMPLETED without structurally-valid adversarial-*.json (fail-open on infra error)
adversarial-review-gate.help: run the adversarial review; the artefact unlocks the marker
adversarial-review-gate.teaches: touch artefact.json does not satisfy structural validation

zone-write-guard.mechanism: PreToolUse:Write/Edit zone boundary deny — zone-write-guard.sh (sprint alias: path-domain-check)
zone-write-guard.help: write inside your zone; framework zone is submodule-owned

legba-custody-chain.mechanism: exit-1 verify (legba.mjs:107) on the governed path (#39); skipping the governed path skips it
legba-custody-chain.teaches: challenge = fraud-proof by re-execution: legba.mjs challenge <run-dir> --span N --seq K

beads-preflight.mechanism: skill-prose task lifecycle (implement/review read beads via instructions; no hook fires on skip)
beads-preflight.help: br list --status open before claiming done

compose-calls-ceiling.mechanism: DECLARED in Form-C manifest, unenforced at runtime — proven hollow live (declared 2, actual 68; S1.4 decisions.md)
compose-calls-ceiling.help: none yet — budget-exhaustion → watchdog clew is the S3 re-grounding spike
compose-calls-ceiling.teaches: a ceiling that cannot reap is signage, not a gate

block-destructive-bash.help: scope the command; destructive forms need explicit operator action
